reviews.comment: Disorganized and hardly even 'taught', just had us read a self-help book and writes a bunch of papers. Writing is my strong suit and this was one of the hardest classes I took, not because the material was complex or challenging, but because there was an endless amount of busy work. I learned nothing.
Dr.Jones is a really good professor and an overall cool person. She cares about her students and is easy to talk to. She can be very disorganized and confusing at times.

Extremely disorganized, doesn't really explain anything in class. Everything I learned was outside of class and when you asked for help, you were supposed to put it in a discord and have the other students help. I did this multiple times on my final project and I never received any sort of help.
Good person, extremely disorganized. You will be provided a syllabus that will eventually look strikingly dissimilar to what you leave the class having done.
I really like her classes. I feel like I'm actually learning and I don't feel judged when I come to her with questions. Really cool professor!
